name: Dirt Racing VR: SUV Offroad Challenge

reviews.review_description: The cars need to be updated that you race against they all look cheap and tacky they don't like the picture need more better levels better environments better stages graphic polish more trucks. They definitely don't like the cars in the picture we're going to pictures look real and graphics and detail The one in the game look cheap and fake make the game boring cuz it got PlayStation 2 graphics or quest to graphics lower poly doesn't feel like I'm really driving in a truck racing against other trucks feel like a more for like little kids The way the Jeeps look on that screenshot picture doesn't look like it on the game and the cars don't look like actual car like Tucker toy cheap made cars that you race against the mud splitting on the window need to be improved your vehicles need to be approved and levels need to be approved and don't feel like I'm driving and I SUV extreme racing game it doesn't feel like I'm it's insane like your advertising it feels cheaply made and rushed The cars do not look good The tracks kind of suck as well it do make you little sick they're not fun to race on they're boring track but that was rushed like I'm just driving in a circle ain't much environment it's kind of boring if not going to put out a game please make the game look like the picture you're advertising Y'all make these games and trick people with these pictures and then they bomb just to find the game sucks  a rush cash grab
